criteria.criterion: purge_bridge.py's deletion commit routes through the unified store write lock (no raw unlocked git add -A + git commit on the tracker). Proving: rg -n 'subprocess.run.*git.*commit' shows no unlocked whole-index commit; the write path acquires the store write lock.
A concurrency regression test (mirroring tests/interfaces/store/test_enrich_drain_prune_concurrency.py) shows purge-bridge racing concurrent locked writes loses nothing (RED before, GREEN after).

citation.description: Ticket comment by Joe Oakhart: Gerrit 845 (origin/main f2a8410a9) and Gerrit 852 (origin/main 3ed3662c9) both passed Gerrit Verified +1 via GitHub Actions full build-and-test gate (lint + typecheck + test suite). Post-merge 'Test Suite (mirror)' workflow also green. The implementation code is concrete and non-stubbed, consistent with a passing build.

criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test pass.
